title: ProDec 4 Pack Filling Blades for Applying and Smoothing Fillers
features: Pack of 4 filling blades for small filling jobs on walls, ceilings and woodwork
Flexible steel blade for pushing filler into cracks and holes and giving a smooth surface profile
Suitable for use with general purpose and fine surface fillers
Full width plastic handle for close control with textured grip
Contains 50mm (2"), 80mm (3"), 100mm (4") and 120mm (5") blades for a wide variety of jobs
MORE INFORMATION BELOW in the 'From The Manufacturer' section - click on 'See More Product Details' or scroll down
description: From the manufacturer ProDec is the UK's biggest and most widely distributed brand of trade decorating accessories, so whether you're a seasoned pro, enthusiastic DIYer or even a beginner, we've got everything you need for a great finish - just add paint Filling blades - for close control filling These handy filling blades are a useful alternative to traditional filling knives and are ideal for a wide variety of small filling and spot repair jobs. They feature a wide, deep blade mounted onto a short, full width plastic handle which gives close control with general purpose and fine surface fillers on walls, ceilings and woodwork. The blade is made from thin, flexible steel that is ideal for pushing filler into cracks and small holes and giving a smooth surface profile. The set contains one of each of 50mm (2"), 80mm (3"), 100mm (4") and 120mm (5") blades. Solutions for applying fillers and sealants from ProDec Fillers, sealants and caulk are essential to getting your surface perfectly smooth ready for painting or papering. Whether you're applying or smoothing, filling deep holes, hairline cracks, long joins between plasterboard panels and more, ProDec has a range of tools to help you get your surface in tiptop condition. Rosewood filling knives A flexible stainless steel blade with full tang that extends all the way through the handle and prevents it snapping at the join of handle and blade, giving it a much longer lifetime than half tang and DIY scrapers. Mounted onto a premium quality varnished handle made from durable rosewood. Available in 1", 2", 3" and 4" sizes. Duragrip filling knives A flexible stainless steel blade with full tang mounted onto ProDec's premium quality Duragrip soft grip handle that is ergonomically shaped for reduced hand fatigue. It also has a solid steel hammer end which is useful for quickly and efficiently hammering nails, tacks, wall plugs, etc. Available in 1.25", 2", 3" and 4" sizes. Filling blades A deep, thin and flexible steel blade mounted onto a short, full width plastic handle which gives close control with general purpose and fine surface fillers on walls, ceilings and woodwork. Available in a pack of 4 mixed sizes containing 2", 3", 4" and 5" widths. Caulkers With a flexible plastic blade that has a wider profile than standard filling knives, caulkers enable you to fill gaps of many shapes and sizes quickly and efficiently. They are particularly useful where long joins require sealing, such as marrying plasterboards together. Available in 8", 10" and 12" sizes. Taping knives A high carbon steel blade, heat treated for strength. It has a laser-straight edge that makes it ideal for smoothing plasterboard jointing tape down to give the lowest possible profile for a seamless appearance when plastered, as well as filling seams and holes for an ultra-smooth, professional finish. Available in 6", 8", 10" and 12" sizes. Skeleton caulking guns Trade quality guns for applying cartridge-based sealants, caulk and fillers, featuring a powerful trigger, robust plunger and a release clip to give a clean break in the sealant bead, ensuring no long, messy strings. Available in standard format plus a reinforced model that is especially ideal for higher viscosity sealants. Revolving caulking gun Refines the classic skeleton design to the next level, for trade quality, ultra-smooth application of cartridge-based sealants, caulk and fillers. The reinforced barrel not only gives heavy duty performance, it can be rotated during application to give a continuous smooth bead around corners and in awkward areas. Foil sausage guns Robust, full metal barrel construction ensuring no mess when used with foil-based sealants, caulk and fillers and also compatible with traditional cartridges. Features powerful plunger and powdered coated trigger with quick release clip for precise control to stop the flow when required. Available in 400ml and 600ml versions.
